text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, first place! That's how I like to do things!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I love a real, serious battle! Feels great when I
come out on top!
choice_data_list: Time to train harder for tougher foes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Right?! Hehe! Man, I love it when you praise me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing pumps me up more than crushin' a strong
opponent!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I'm on the track, I can really feel the
pressure from my rivals. None of them wanna lose
or give up their spot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Testin' your mettle against unrelenting foes and
breaking ahead for victory... Now that's what a
good race's all about!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, I can't wait for the next one! I'm gonna
destroy the competition!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You betcha! Great minds think alike, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The more I win, the stronger the opponents I'll be
able to race, and when I think of that, I just can't
wait to train some more!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and give me 100 uphill sprints, or a
long-distance 100-kilometer swim!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll complete any exercise you give me! Time to
smash my limits and get even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait! Ol' Hishiama here is takin' you all
down!
